identity.tagline: Deep work, one session at a time
identity.description: Focus Timer is a minimalist iOS app that helps knowledge workers block distractions and complete meaningful work in timed focus sessions with gentle break reminders.

audience.primary: Remote knowledge workers and students who struggle to stay focused during deep work blocks.
painPoints: Constant context-switching between apps and notifications
No simple way to track how much focused time was actually spent

inline.headline: Deep work, one session at a time
inline.subheadline: A minimalist focus timer for iOS that helps you finish what matters.
inline.body: Block distractions, run timed focus sessions, and see how much deep work you actually get done each day.

inline.headline: Start your first focus session today
inline.subheadline: One-time purchase. No subscription. No ads.
